contentBlocks.original:
तुलसी श्री सखी शुभे पापहारिणि पुण्यदे ।
नमस्ते नारदनुते नमो नारायण प्रिये ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
tulasi śrīsakhi śubhe pāpahāriṇi puṇyade .
namaste nāradanute nārāyaṇamanaḥpriye ..
contentBlocks.translation: Tulasi, Sree, friend, auspicious one, abstracter of sins, giver of virtues, salutation to You, (who is) worshipped by Narada, salutation, O beloved of Narayana.
contentBlocks.meanings: तुलसी (tulasi) – Tulasi; श्री (śrī) – Sree; सखी (sakhī) – friend; शुभे (śubhe) – auspicious one; पापहारिणि (pāpahāriṇi) – abstracter of sins (pāpa:sins | hāriṇi:abstracter); पुण्यदे (puṇyade) – giver of virtues (puṇya:virtues | de:giver); नमस्ते (namaste) – salutation to you; नारदनुते (nāradanute) – worshipped by Narada (nārada:Narada | nute:worshipped by); नमो (namo) – salutation; नारायण (nārāyaṇa) – Narayana; प्रिये (priye) – beloved;
